# Discussion categories for Darkian Studio (darkian-studio/app)

This file documents the GitHub Discussions categories. Create them in the repo
settings (Discussions → Categories) with these names and descriptions.

| Category            | Description                                                              |
| ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Announcements       | Official release notes and beta status updates (maintainers only).       |
| General             | Anything DS-related that does not fit another category.                  |
| Q&A                 | Questions about install, setup, runtimes, and troubleshooting.           |
| Show and tell       | Projects, screenshots, and workflows built with DS.                     |
| Bug reports (meta)  | Talk about reporting bugs / log collection (use Issues for actual bugs). |
| Feature ideas       | Early-stage ideas before they become a Feature Request issue.            |

Notes:
- Actual bug reports and feature requests belong in **Issues** with the
  templates, not Discussions.
- Announcements is restricted to maintainers.
